game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Mow down thousands of night creatures and survive until dawn! Vampire Survivors is a gothic horror casual game with rogue-lite elements, where your choices can allow you to quickly snowball against the hundreds of monsters that get thrown at you. Be the bullet hell! Vampire Survivors is a time survival game with minimalistic gameplay and roguelite elements.
Hell is empty, the devils are here, and there's no place to run or hide. All you can do is survive as long as you can until death inevitably puts an end to your struggles. Gather gold in each run to buy upgrades and help the next survivor.

The supernatural indie phenomenon that lets you be the bullet hell!



Now with local co-op for up to 4 players!

  • Supports mouse, keyboard, controller, and touch screen.

Starting Tips

  • Take your time to grab gems and items, they won't disappear.
  • Get two or three offensive weapons at first, but focus on leveling them up one at a time.
  • Armour and Luck are good starting power-ups to spend money on.
  • Refund power-ups often, it's free, and try new upgrade paths.

v0.1.0 release date:
- itch: Mar 31, 2021
- Steam: Dec 17, 2021
game_info.description: Survive waves of relentless night creatures until dawn breaks! You are a lone survivor in a gothic wasteland where monsters spawn endlessly. Move to dodge enemies, automatically attack nearby creatures, and collect experience gems to level up. Each level grants powerful upgrades to your weapons and abilities. Collect gold coins to boost your stats between runs. Can you last 5 minutes until sunrise?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Confirm level-up choices
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/Unpause game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can move in all four directions without getting stuck. Ensures position updates correctly and the player stays within reasonable bounds.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in a square pattern using arrow keys, cycling through up, right, down, and left movements. Continue this pattern for a fixed duration while avoiding enemies passively.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position changes smoothly in response to arrow key inputs. No collision errors occur. The player remains visible on screen and movement feels responsive.

TEST_1.expected: Player position changes smoothly in response to arrow key inputs. No collision errors occur. The player remains visible on screen and movement feels responsive.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game loop and win condition. Validates that a player can survive until dawn (5 minutes) using optimal strategies including movement, leveling up, and upgrade selection.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent kiting patterns to avoid enemy clusters. Prioritize collecting experience gems when safe. Select damage and area upgrades early, then survivability upgrades. Keep moving in circular patterns to manage enemy spawns and maintain safe distance.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully survive for 5 minutes (18000 frames at 60 FPS). Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Player demonstrates ability to manage threats through movement and strategic upgrades.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the leveling system and upgrade mechanics. Validates that experience collection, level progression, and power-up selection work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Aggressively collect experience gems while taking calculated risks. Select varied upgrades to test different power-up combinations. Verify that each upgrade properly enhances player capabilities.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully levels up multiple times. Each level-up offers valid upgrade choices. Selected upgrades properly modify player stats and abilities. Game balance remains challenging but fair.
TEST_3.description: Tests the leveling system and upgrade mechanics. Validates that experience collection, level progression, and power-up selection work correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests enemy spawning, AI behavior, and combat mechanics. Validates that enemies spawn at appropriate rates, behave intelligently, and deal damage correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally position player to encounter enemies. Observe enemy pathfinding and attack patterns. Test damage system by allowing controlled hits. Verify that automatic attacks trigger and deal damage.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Enemies spawn consistently throughout the game. Enemy AI properly tracks player position. Combat feels balanced with clear visual feedback. Health system accurately reflects damage taken.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests death condition and game over state. Validates that player can lose the game when health reaches zero and the game properly transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Allow enemies to repeatedly hit the player by standing still or moving minimally. Do not collect health pickups. Continue until health depletes completely.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Player health decreases with each enemy hit. When health reaches zero, game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Game over screen displays appropriate lose message and allows restart.
